creator: sergey@nk.ukrtel.net
text:
FreeBSD 2.2.2 with Cyclom-16YeP (PCI) multiport card reboot
at random time without any visible reason (approx. during
10-15 min. from startup). Also, I'm observe data loss with
the same multiport card even if only one port is active.

Fix: 

Unknown
How-To-Repeat: Insert Cyclom-Y PCI card in your computer with FreeBSD,
recompile kernel, and configure one port for accepting dial-in
calls. Lock port at 57600 or 115200. Call to the server
and transmit large file to server via ftp. During file transfer,
try to compile any program, and you can see "silo overflow"
messages at system console. During next 10-20 min your server
rebooted itself.
